headline: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) Appears Attractive With its Embedded Payments Technology
summary: Jack Henry & Associates Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) is one of the 10 best payment processing stocks to buy now. On June 2, to strengthen the robustness of its nationwide pay-by-bank network and increase its instant payment capabilities, Aeropay stated that it is using Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ:JKHY) ‘s embedded payments technology. Aeropay also shared […]
